info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Creation API enables businesses to streamline the onboarding process by allowing the automated registration of user accounts. This API provides the necessary endpoint to submit user information and initiate account setup efficiently. Typical consumers of this API include web and mobile application developers looking to enhance user experience during registration. The API is designed to ensure secure and reliable account creation, supporting businesses in maintaining active user engagement.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to register a new account by providing the necessary details such as username, password, and other relevant information. Successful account creation will return the account details and a confirmation message.

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new account. Provide the necessary account details in JSON format.

200.description: Request completed successfully, returning the created account information.

500.description: Unexpected server error encountered while processing the request.

404.description: The requested resource (account) was not found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: Type of the account (e.g., Savings, Checking).

currency.description: Currency of the account (e.g., USD, EUR).

status.description: Current status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive).

branchCode.description: Code representing the branch where the account was created.

createdDate.description: Date when the account was created, in ISO 8601 format.

message.description: Message providing additional information about the account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Response schema for a successfully created account through the account creation operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Accounts Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the operation; false indicates failure.

error.description: A description of the error encountered.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The API path that was requested when the error occurred.

trace.description: Debugging information, such as stack trace.

suggestion.description: Suggestions on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the error response structure for failed account operations.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database timeout occurred while saving account information.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer related to the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code identifying the nature of the error.

message.description: A message providing more context about the error.

branchCode.description: The code of the branch associated with the customer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: Detailed information about the specific error that occurred.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

accountType.description: The type of account being opened (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: The currency in which the account will be held (e.g., USD, EUR).

initialDeposit.description: The initial amount of money to deposit into the account.

branchCode.description: The code of the branch where the account will be opened.

customerCategory.description: The category of the customer (e.g., individual, business).

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the request body for creating a new account.

onlineBanking.description: Indicates whether online banking is available for this account.

mobileBanking.description: Indicates whether mobile banking is available for this account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-AccountFe.description: This schema defines the features available for an account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for POST Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: The short error message indicating the type of error encountered.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Customer profile not found for account creation.

path.description: The original request path that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A trace identifier for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and submit the request again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the error response returned by the POST operation on accounts when a resource is not found (404 error).

example.message: Customer profile not found for account creation.

details.message: No registered banking customer exists with the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and submit the request again.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
